Enterprise

Corporate office WiFi that's secure, seamless, and enterprise-ready.

Office campuses and co-working spaces are still managing a shared WiFi password and offboarding leavers by hand. A branded captive portal covers visitors, while Staff WiFi removes the password problem, with the Purple app as the engine behind every staff connection.

No shared passwords to rotate, share, or forget
Access revoked automatically the moment someone leaves the IdP
Built on the same platform already trusted by 80,000 venues
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

Slow WiFi and unauthorized devices dragging down productivity

Employees need a secure, fast network that just works: reliable speeds even on busy floors, unauthorized devices blocked with locked-down access, and clear visibility and central control of network usage.

Visitors and contractors need access, without touching the corporate network

Visitors, clients, and contractors need easy access that never touches the corporate network. Guests onboard in seconds with a simple branded login, with guest traffic fully isolated from corporate systems.

Every starter and leaver means another manual access change

Every starter and leaver is a manual IT task. Tying access to Entra ID, Google Workspace, or Okta means it happens automatically, with zero manual intervention.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

STAFF WIFI
The end of the shared office WiFi password

WPA3-Enterprise ties every employee's access to Entra ID, Google Workspace, or Okta, so starters and leavers happen automatically, no manual IT ticket, no lingering access.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta
Powered by the Purple app

Every login in enterprise runs through the same app.

Whichever product opens the deal, staff sign-in, a guest's first connection, or a resident provisioning their network, it all happens in the same Purple app. That's one engine to explain, one experience to demo, and one channel that keeps paying off after the first login.

Proof point

Built on the same identity infrastructure trusted by 80,000 venues.

Staff WiFi is new, but the platform underneath it isn't. The identity infrastructure is proven at scale already, ISO 27001 and GDPR and CCPA compliant, with a 99.999% cloud RADIUS uptime SLA, so the credibility conversation starts from a strong position.

80k+
venues worldwide
99.999%
cloud RADIUS uptime
2012
Purple founded
Marketing support

Need co-branded materials for enterprise?

Request sector-specific campaign packs, one-pagers, and co-branded assets for enterprise deals, including Purple app collateral you can hand straight to a prospect.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.
